zh.lifeSummary: 當John Del Holte II於1255年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾庫頓時，他的父親John Del Holt I30歲，母親Emma de Hatton26歲。他於1274年與Joan Audley結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1317年在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾霍爾特享年62歲。

nameMeanings.name: Holte
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Bjorg, Erik, Helmer, Hjalmer, Knute, Nels, Nordahl, Selmer, Swen, Thorvald.
North German: habitational name from any of several places so named.

variants.name: Holt
meanings: English, North German, Dutch, Danish, and Norwegian: topographic name for someone who lived in or by a small wood, from Middle English, Middle Low German, Danish, and Norwegian holt, or a habitational name from one of the many places called with this word. In England, the surname is widely distributed, but more common in Lancashire and Yorkshire than elsewhere.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

nameMeanings.name: Del
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Colloquial pet form of Derek , with alteration of the exposed -r of the short form to -l ( compare Hal and Tel ).

variants.name: Derek
meanings: From a Low German or Dutch form of Theodoric ( see Terry ), introduced into Britain during the Middle Ages by Flemish weavers, although it was not much used until a sudden explosion of popularity in the mid 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When John Del Holte II was born in 1255, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Del Holt I, was 30 and his mother, Emma de Hatton, was 26. He married Joan Audley in 1274. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1317, in Holt, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Del Holte II est né en 1255, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Del Holt I, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Emma de Hatton, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Joan Audley en 1274. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1317, à Holt, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Del Holte II 1255 in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Del Holt I 30 und seine Mutter Emma de Hatton 26. Er hat 1274 Joan Audley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1317 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Holt, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Del Holte II è nato il nel 1255 nel Coughton, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Del Holt I, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Emma de Hatton, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Joan Audley nel 1274. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1317, nel Holt, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni.
